mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_task( biz_type, biz_id, region, machine_result, status, auditor_id, remark ) VALUES ( #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{region}, #{machineResult}, #{status}, #{auditorId}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM audit_log l LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.id = l.admin_id

SELECT l.id, l.admin_id, COALESCE(au.account, '') AS admin_account, COALESCE(au.name, '') AS admin_name, l.action, l.target, l.detail, l.ip, l.created_at FROM audit_log l LEFT JOIN admin_user au ON au.id = l.admin_id
ORDER BY l.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.id, t.biz_type, t.biz_id, t.region, t.machine_result, t.status, t.auditor_id, t.remark, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN NULL WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN NULL WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ra.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.target_shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.shop_id ELSE r.shop_id END AS shop_id, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN '' WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN '' WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.name ELSE s.name END AS shop_name, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(bau.nickname, ''), ba.account) WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN au.nickname WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ram.company_name WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sm.company_name WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.user_name WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN m.company_name ELSE r.user_name END AS user_name, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN ba.reason WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN uc.reason WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ar.content WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.summary WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.content WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.title ELSE r.content END AS review_content, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM audit_task t LEFT JOIN review r ON r.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 3 LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 4 LEFT JOIN deal d ON d.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 2 LEFT JOIN merchant_shop_change sc ON sc.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 5 LEFT JOIN merchant_review_appeal ra ON ra.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 6 LEFT JOIN user_expert_certification uc ON uc.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 7 LEFT JOIN app_user au ON au.id = uc.user_id AND t.biz_type = 7 LEFT JOIN user_ban_appeal ba ON ba.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 8 LEFT JOIN app_user bau ON bau.id = ba.user_id AND t.biz_type = 8 LEFT JOIN review ar ON ar.id = ra.review_id AND t.biz_type = 6 LEFT JOIN shop s ON s.id = CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ra.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.target_shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.shop_id ELSE r.shop_id END LEFT JOIN merchant m ON m.id = d.merchant_id LEFT JOIN merchant sm ON sm.id = sc.merchant_id LEFT JOIN merchant ram ON ram.id = ra.merchant_id
ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.id, t.biz_type, t.biz_id, t.region, t.machine_result, t.status, t.auditor_id, t.remark, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN NULL WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN NULL WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ra.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.target_shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.shop_id ELSE r.shop_id END AS shop_id, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN '' WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN '' WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.name ELSE s.name END AS shop_name, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(bau.nickname, ''), ba.account) WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN au.nickname WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ram.company_name WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sm.company_name WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.user_name WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN m.company_name ELSE r.user_name END AS user_name, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN ba.reason WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN uc.reason WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ar.content WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.summary WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.content WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.title ELSE r.content END AS review_content, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM audit_task t LEFT JOIN review r ON r.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 3 LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 4 LEFT JOIN deal d ON d.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 2 LEFT JOIN merchant_shop_change sc ON sc.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 5 LEFT JOIN merchant_review_appeal ra ON ra.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 6 LEFT JOIN user_expert_certification uc ON uc.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 7 LEFT JOIN app_user au ON au.id = uc.user_id AND t.biz_type = 7 LEFT JOIN user_ban_appeal ba ON ba.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 8 LEFT JOIN app_user bau ON bau.id = ba.user_id AND t.biz_type = 8 LEFT JOIN review ar ON ar.id = ra.review_id AND t.biz_type = 6 LEFT JOIN shop s ON s.id = CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ra.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.target_shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.shop_id ELSE r.shop_id END LEFT JOIN merchant m ON m.id = d.merchant_id LEFT JOIN merchant sm ON sm.id = sc.merchant_id LEFT JOIN merchant ram ON ram.id = ra.merchant_id WHERE t.id = #{taskId}

SELECT t.id, t.biz_type, t.biz_id, t.region, t.machine_result, t.status, t.auditor_id, t.remark, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN NULL WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN NULL WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ra.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.target_shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.shop_id ELSE r.shop_id END AS shop_id, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN '' WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN '' WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.name ELSE s.name END AS shop_name, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN COALESCE(NULLIF(bau.nickname, ''), ba.account) WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN au.nickname WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ram.company_name WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sm.company_name WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.user_name WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN m.company_name ELSE r.user_name END AS user_name, CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 8 THEN ba.reason WHEN t.biz_type = 7 THEN uc.reason WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ar.content WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.summary WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.content WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.title ELSE r.content END AS review_content, t.created_at, t.updated_at FROM audit_task t LEFT JOIN review r ON r.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 3 LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 4 LEFT JOIN deal d ON d.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 2 LEFT JOIN merchant_shop_change sc ON sc.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 5 LEFT JOIN merchant_review_appeal ra ON ra.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 6 LEFT JOIN user_expert_certification uc ON uc.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 7 LEFT JOIN app_user au ON au.id = uc.user_id AND t.biz_type = 7 LEFT JOIN user_ban_appeal ba ON ba.id = t.biz_id AND t.biz_type = 8 LEFT JOIN app_user bau ON bau.id = ba.user_id AND t.biz_type = 8 LEFT JOIN review ar ON ar.id = ra.review_id AND t.biz_type = 6 LEFT JOIN shop s ON s.id = CASE WHEN t.biz_type = 6 THEN ra.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 5 THEN sc.target_shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 4 THEN p.shop_id WHEN t.biz_type = 2 THEN d.shop_id ELSE r.shop_id END LEFT JOIN merchant m ON m.id = d.merchant_id LEFT JOIN merchant sm ON sm.id = sc.merchant_id LEFT JOIN merchant ram ON ram.id = ra.merchant_id WHERE t.biz_type = #{bizType} AND t.biz_id = #{bizId} AND t.status = 0 ORDER BY t.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_task SET status = 2, auditor_id = 0, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE biz_type = #{bizType} AND biz_id = #{bizId} AND status = 0
UPDATE audit_task SET status = #{status}, auditor_id = #{auditorId}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{taskId} AND status = 0
UPDATE deal SET audit_status=#{auditStatus}, status=0, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{dealId} AND region=#{region} AND audit_status=0 AND is_deleted=FALSE
UPDATE post SET audit_status=#{auditStatus}, audit_remark=#{auditRemark}, updated_at=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id=#{postId} AND region=#{region} AND is_deleted=FALSE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_log(admin_id, action, target, detail, ip) VALUES (#{adminId}, #{action}, #{target}, #{detail}, #{ip})
